# SEMCO Panamá

SEMCO Panamá is a premium electromechanical engineering and maintenance firm with over 15 years of active experience in the Republic of Panama. They specialize in critical building systems, offering unique digital maintenance tracking (*trazabilidad digital* with real-time photographic and checklist logs).

## Core Identity
- **Company Name:** SEMCO Panamá (Professional Service / Electromechanical Engineering)
- **Founded Year:** 2011
- **Service Area:** Entire Republic of Panama (Base in Panama City)
- **Value Proposition:** "Ingeniería y mantenimiento electromecánico que no falla cuando más importa."
- **Key Feature:** Digital-first preventative maintenance audits conforming strictly to NFPA, UL, FM, and Panama fire code regulations.

## Contact Information (NAP)
- **Address:** Rio Abajo, Villa Rica, Local D15, Ciudad de Panamá, Panamá
- **Telephone:** +507 235-9876
- **Email:** info@semco.com.pa
- **Work Hours:** Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- **WhatsApp Chat:** https://wa.me/5072359876

## Core Services & Keywords
1. **Sistemas Contra Incendios (Fire Protection)**
   - NFPA 25 inspections, NFPA 20 fire pumps, NFPA 13 automatic sprinklers, NFPA 14 standpipes, certified fire alarms.
   - URL: `/servicios/sistemas-contra-incendio-panama`
2. **Sistemas de Bombeo de Agua (Water Pumping)**
   - Potable water pumps, constant pressure with VFD controls, booster pumps, sump and drainage pump systems (achique pluvial, freático, sanitario).
   - URL: `/servicios/sistemas-de-bombeo-panama`
3. **Plantas Eléctricas de Emergencia (Emergency Power)**
   - Backup diesel and gas generators, Automatic Transfer Switches (ATS), synchronism panels, routine load testing.
   - URL: `/servicios/plantas-electricas-panama`
4. **Centros de Control de Motores / MCC (Motor Control Centers)**
   - Custom electrical control cabinets, soft starters (arrancadores suaves), variable frequency drives (VFD), NEC code compliance.
   - URL: `/servicios/centros-de-control-de-motores-panama`
5. **Energía Solar y Eficiencia (Solar Power & Energy Audits)**
   - Commercial and industrial photovoltaic systems, solar net metering interconnections with Naturgy/ENSA, energy efficiency reviews. Notable project: Celsia Torre Argos (658 solar panels).
   - URL: `/servicios/energia-solar-panama`
6. **Gerencia de Proyectos y Consultoría (Project Management & Consulting)**
   - Technical project audits, on-site personnel training, hazard/risk analyses, PMI methodologies.
   - URL: `/servicios/gerencia-de-proyectos-panama`

## Key URL Paths
- Home (Inicio): `https://semco.com.pa/`
- Projects Portfolio (Proyectos): `https://semco.com.pa/proyectos`
- About Us (Nosotros): `https://semco.com.pa/nosotros`
- Technical FAQ (Preguntas Frecuentes): `https://semco.com.pa/preguntas-frecuentes`
- Contact & Map (Contacto): `https://semco.com.pa/contacto`

## Standards and Memberships
- NFPA (National Fire Protection Association) Member
- Benemérito Cuerpo de Bomberos de Panamá Approved
- JTIA (Junta Técnica de Ingeniería y Arquitectura) Certified Engineers
- UL Listed & FM Approved Equipment Supplier
